Atlanta, GA

Personal Injury Lawyers in Atlanta, GA

360 listings · Atlanta

Compare 360 personal injury lawyers in Atlanta, GA, ranked by rating and reviews. Georgia's statute of limitations for most personal injury claims is two years from the date of the injury (O.C.G.A. § 9-3-33). Most personal injury lawyers work on contingency, so you pay no fee unless they recover money for you.

Frequently asked questions

How much does a personal injury lawyer cost in Atlanta?

Fees vary by case and firm. Georgia's statute of limitations for most personal injury claims is two years from the date of the injury (O.C.G.A. § 9-3-33). Most personal injury lawyers work on contingency, so you pay no fee unless they recover money for you. Ask each Atlanta listing about fees and free consultations using the Call or Website button.

Who is a top personal injury lawyer in Atlanta?

Holston & Huntley Trial Attorneys is among the highest rated personal injury practices serving Atlanta, with 5.0 stars across 1633 reviews.

How do I choose a personal injury lawyer in Atlanta?

Compare ratings and reviews, confirm the lawyer handles injury & accidents matters, and ask about experience and fees in a first consultation. This page lists 360 options in Atlanta.
